note: Should-trigger / should-not-trigger queries for tuning activation. The marker is 'farnsworth loop:N' (single pass) or 'farnsworth loop:N:2' (two pass), case-insensitive, with an optional leading colon and surrounding spaces. The third segment is the pass count: omitted or 1 = single, 2 = two pass. 'mode' is the expected mode for should_trigger cases. Non-triggers are genuine non-tournaments or other tournament phrasings that belong to the separate best-of-n skill, not this explicitly-named one.

queries.query: write a python program for hangman game, farnsworth loop:4
build a CSV parser farnsworth loop:3
implement a token bucket rate limiter :farnsworth loop:6:2
draft a distributor pitch email, Farnsworth Loop:4:2
two-round attempt on this regex farnsworth loop:5:2
what is iterative refinement in LLM sampling?
explain how genetic algorithms do selection and mutation
review this code and give me two passes of feedback
i made two attempts at this already, which is better?
summarise this document in two passes, skim then detail
set up a two-stage build pipeline in CI
compare Opus and Sonnet on a coding task
give me one strong solution, no tournament
what is the Farnsworth lens in photography?
